title: Opinion: Opinion | US-Iran Talks, And The Difference Between 'Negotiation' And 'Humiliation'
summary_full: Trump's approach to the Iran question has been irrational. He reacted to the failure at Islamabad saying that he wanted not 90% or 95% but 100% satisfaction. This is dictation, not negotiation.
summary_public: Trump's approach to the Iran question has been irrational. He reacted to the failure at Islamabad saying that he wanted not 90% or 95% but 100% satisfaction. This is dictation, not negotiation.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump's approach to the Iran question has been irrational.
